arts.ttl: Europa League: How Man United, Tottenham, Rangers can make top eight
arts.sum: Man United, Tottenham and Rangers are all looking to finish in the top eight of the Europa League. Here's what each team needs to do to make it.

arts.ttl: United investigating Rangers fans in home sections
arts.sum: Manchester United will launch an investigation after a number of Rangers fans were able to watch Thursday's Europa League match from home sections at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim offers honest opinion on Bruno Fernandes' on-field antics after Man United skipper's injury-time winner against Rangers
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Fernandes' antics rile opponents and rival fans, and he has admitted getting under the skin of his own team-mates with his moaning and gesticulating on the pitch.

arts.ttl: Talks ongoing to sign Rangers player – Managerial change could be key
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Besiktas have stepped up their pursuit of Rangers defender Rıdvan Yılmaz. There have been reports in recent weeks that Rangers could offload the Turkey international despite Philippe Clement starting him in the past six league games. arts.ttl: Cyriel Dessers continues his Rangers love-hate melodrama as Robin Propper details 4-minute Man Utd rollercoaster
arts.sum: Cyriel Dessers sent the away end wild but Bruno Fernandes fired home a last-gasp winner in a cruel blow to the visitors
